summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open maintainer-ready PRs. No GitHub mutations are allowed by the job. #90745 is routed to central security handling because deterministic validation reported it as security-sensitive; no ProjectClownfish fix action is safe for that PR. The other four PRs remain independent PR candidates pending full merge preflight; none can be recommended for merge because the artifact does not prove mergeability, resolved review-bot comments, or a passed Codex /review merge preflight.
